code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a Reference pair beside a labeled Scene grid
code_prompt_defaults.question_text: How many labeled Scene cells show the same before-to-after relation as the Reference pair?
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around all matching Scene cells
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
